Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: Aims to safeguard intangible cultural heritage (Target 11.4) through topics like '地景觀察' (landscape observation) and '百年來的台語歌' (A century of Taiwanese songs).

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: A minimal link is found in the note to '維護智慧財產權，務必使用正版書籍' (Respect Copyright), a sustainable practice, but it is not a course topic.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Examines '語言政策' (language policy), relating to non-discriminatory policies (Target 16.b), and promotes '台語新聞' (Taiwanese news), supporting public access to information (Target 16.10).
